data.title: Billy Corgan to receive TEC Innovation Award at 41st Annual NAMM TEC Awards on Jan. 22, 2026, during The NAMM Show. Characters: 111
data.description: The 41st edition of the NAMM TEC Awards is scheduled to be held on the evening of Thursday, January 22. The prestigious event will coincide with The NAMM Show in CARLSBAD, California. NAMM, recognized as the largest worldwide non-profit music trade association, will be hosting the event. The awards ceremony is a celebration of technical excellence within the music industry and is highly anticipated by industry professionals and enthusiasts alike.

data.title: ALLETE acquisition by CPP Investments and GIP approved by MPUC, expected to close on Dec. 15. (Numbers: NYSE: ALE, Dec. 15)
data.description: ALLETE, Inc. disclosed that they have examined the Minnesota Public Utilities Commission's written order endorsing their acquisition by Canada Pension Plan Investment Board (CPP Investments) and Global Infrastructure Partners (GIP), prominent global investors in infrastructure and sustainable energy. The acquisition, set to finalize on Dec. 15, is pending the fulfillment of certain conditions. ALLETE, Inc. trades on NYSE under the symbol ALE.

data.title: ITC Infotech wins PTC Partner Network Award for FY25 in PLM category.
data.description: ITC Infotech, based in Paramus, N.J., London, and Bangalore, India, has recently received the prestigious PTC Partner Network Award for the fiscal year 2025. The award was granted in the Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) sector, highlighting ITC Infotech's excellence in this field.

data.title: Celcuity presents updated results from PIK3CA WT cohort of VIKTORIA-1 trial at 2025 SABCS. Study covers HR+, HER2- patients with ABC, following progression on CDK4/6 inhibitor.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Celcuity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELC) disclosed fresh findings from the Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 trial for gedatolisib, a PAM inhibitor, aimed at developing targeted therapies for oncology. The trial, focused on adults with HR+, HER2-, PIK3CA WT, ABC post-treatment with CDK4/6 and aromatase inhibitors, revealed promising outcomes. The updates were shared at the 2025 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. These results mark a significant step in advancing treatment for this patient population.

data.title: On Location announces celebrity roster for FIFA World Cup 2026™ Hospitality Captain Program in 16 host cities.
data.description: In preparation for the FIFA World Cup 2026™, celebrity personalities from sports and entertainment will represent each host city. This initiative aims to create a unique and engaging experience for fans, bringing them closer to the event. On Location, a prominent provider of premium hospitality experiences, announced this plan on December 11, 2025. The 2026 World Cup, set to be a grand spectacle, will feature a diverse array of famous figures representing the host cities. Stay tuned for an unmatched sporting and entertainment fusion at this monumental event.

data.title: Empower Mental Health Clinic in Kenosha offers free mental health treatments for firefighters. Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: Empower Mental Health & Wellness Clinic, located in Kenosha, Wisconsin, has announced that they are providing free mental health treatments for firefighters. This initiative is in collaboration with BTL Cares and aims to support first responders in their mental well-being. The services are being offered at no cost and are part of the center's dedication to aiding those who dedicate their lives to saving others. This partnership is a step towards prioritizing the mental health of these individuals who put their lives on the line daily. The clinic's gesture underscores the importance of addressing mental health issues within the firefighting community and providing accessible support.
US Crude Oil Futures Settle At $57.60/Bbl, Down 86 Cents, 1.47 Pct

data.title: UBCF's Pink Bag event helped 91 breast cancer patients, providing support and relief before the holidays.
data.description: In December 2025, United Breast Cancer Foundation (UBCF) hosted the November Pink Bag Shopping event in Huntington Station, NY. This initiative assisted 91 women who are confronting the challenges of breast cancer. The event aimed to offer essential support and alleviate the holiday season stress for these individuals. UBCF expressed satisfaction in the outcome of the multi-day event, emphasizing the importance of aiding those in need during this time.

data.title: Upper Deck e-Pack® launched trading card packs instantly gradable on The Authority™. PITTSBURGH, Dec. 11, 2025 /PRNewswire: Dynamics Inc. introduced this innovation for collectors to experience full cycle of collecting in minutes.
data.description: PITTSBURGH, Dec. 11, 2025 - Dynamics Inc. has introduced a unique opportunity for collectors by offering a complete collecting experience in just minutes at a single location. The renowned security and collectible technology provider has revealed that a selection of trading cards on Upper Deck e-Pack® can now be accessed for the first time. This innovation signals a significant advancement in the industry, allowing collectors to swiftly engage with a wide array of cards like never before.

data.title: PaleyFest LA 2026 announces initial programs: Nobody Wants This, Shrinking, The Pitt. Dates: April 4-12 at Dolby Theatre. Members have exclusive benefits.
data.description: The upcoming festival is set to showcase the first announced programs from popular streaming services – Nobody Wants This from Netflix, Shrinking from Apple TV, and The Pitt from HBO Max. Scheduled to run from April 4 to April 12, 2026, at the prestigious Dolby Theatre in Hollywood. The full lineup of the festival is expected to be revealed on Monday, January 26. Exclusive benefits will be available to Paley members.

data.title: Life Time suggests top last-minute gifts for health lovers before holidays - expert-backed picks from CHANHASSEN, Minn., Dec. 11, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: As the holidays approach, residents of CHANHASSEN, Minn., can now easily give the gift of wellness with the help of expert-backed selections. This initiative by Life Time (NYSE: LTH) aims to offer more meaningful gifts beyond traditional options like sweaters or kitchen gadgets. By selecting these curated picks, shoppers can ensure their loved ones receive thoughtful presents that prioritize well-being, aligning with the current trend of prioritizing health and self-care. This innovative approach provides a convenient solution for those seeking last-minute gifts and promotes a focus on wellness during the festive season.

data.title: Zcash (ZEC) surges 12% post-Fed cut, hitting $300 support. Resists at $459, targets $508 & $556. Bulls gaining control.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Zcash (ZEC) saw a 12% increase on Thursday, surpassing short-term resistance levels due to strong bullish momentum. ZEC has dropped significantly from its $300 support level and is currently challenging a crucial Fibonacci resistance cluster. The 20-, 50-, and 100-day EMAs are showing signs of upward movement, indicating a decrease in selling pressure and a resurgence of buyer control. The upcoming resistance levels are at $459 (0.382), $508 (0.5), and $556 (0.618), the latter being the main profit-taking zone for traders. A clear breakthrough above $459. More information is available on the Benzinga website.

data.title: Rhythm Pharma's stock hits record high after unexpected win for obesity-tied drug for Prader-Willi testing.
data.description: On Thursday, Rhythm Pharmaceuticals announced plans to advance its top drug into registrational testing for Prader-Willi syndrome. Following this news, the company's stock reached a record high due to an unexpected success in treating obesity-related to the syndrome. This development marks a significant milestone for Rhythm Pharma as it continues to make strides in the healthcare industry.

data.title: Paramount CEO urges Warner Bros. shareholders to sell shares, rejecting Netflix deal in recent letter.
data.description: CEO of Paramount Skydance, David Ellison, is advising Warner Bros. shareholders to consider selling their shares to his company instead of proceeding with the Netflix agreement. A letter from Paramount emphasizes this message, underscoring the sentiment that shareholders still have time to act. The plea from Paramount seems to suggest a competitive bid for ownership, potentially diverting from the established deal with Netflix.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 change could affect Bitcoin buying as exclusion from indices may impact its strategy.
data.description: Being excluded from indices followed by passive funds could hinder its ability to purchase Bitcoin. The strategy is declining prior to the annual Nasdaq 100 change, raising concerns about the impact on Bitcoin.

data.title: Rivian diverges from Tesla by integrating LiDAR into its autonomous platform roadmap. (Characters: 85)
data.description: On Thursday, Rivian revealed its plan for advancing its autonomous driving platform. This decision sets Rivian apart from Tesla as they incorporate LiDAR technology into their autonomy system. This move marks a shift in the industry, as Rivian aims to enhance the capabilities of its vehicles. The unique approach adopted by Rivian highlights their commitment to innovation and improving safety on the roads. This development showcases Rivian's strategic vision for autonomous driving, demonstrating a new direction in the industry.

data.title: Silicon Laboratories sees increasing technical performance with Relative Strength Rating upgrade. Potential continued growth.
data.description: Silicon Laboratories has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. Investors are now wondering if this positive trend will persist.

data.title: Aptiv's Relative Strength Rating improves, signaling technical strength. Future prospects being speculated.
data.description: There has been a Relative Strength Rating upgrade for Aptiv, indicating a boost in technical performance. Investors are now questioning whether this positive momentum will persist. The post on Investor's Business Daily highlights the recent advancement in Aptiv's stock performance and hints at potential future growth.

data.title: Wabtec stock hits record high on strong profit growth and technical performance upgrade.
data.description: Wabtec has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating enhanced technical performance. The company's stock has surged to a record high amidst robust profit growth. Investors are now curious about the possibility of this momentum being sustained in the near future.

data.title: Consumers Energy defends customer protections for data centers against AG challenge for economic growth in Michigan.
data.description: A Michigan-based company, Consumers Energy, is advocating for responsible economic development in the state. On December 11, 2025, the company announced its opposition to a legal challenge by the Michigan Attorney General. This challenge aims to reverse new initiatives that could potentially support economic growth in the state. Consumers Energy is dedicated to promoting the prosperity of Michigan and is actively defending these efforts against legal obstacles.
